result.markdown: --- title: "Talks & Workshops" comments: false --- ## Talks - [CEN 2026](https://cen2026.org) 6th Conference of the Central European Network of the International Biometric Society Warsaw, Poland *Identifying Post-COVID Risk Factors with Model-Agnostic Feature Importance* — [Slides](https://slides.lukasburk.de/2026/05-cen/slides.pdf) - [DAGStat 2025](https://dagstat2025.de/) 7th Joint Statistical Meeting of the Deutsche Arbeitsgemeinschaft Statistik Berlin, Germany *Random Planted Forest: A Directly Interpretable Tree Ensemble* — [Slides](https://slides.lukasburk.de/2025/03-dagstat/rpf.pdf) - [Statistical Computing ("Reisensburg") 2024](https://sysbio.uni-ulm.de/ocs/index.php/statcomp/statcomp2024) 54th Workshop of the working groups Statistical Computing (GMDS/IBS-DR) and Klassifikation und Datenanalyse in den Biowissenschaften (GfKl) Wissenschaftszentrum Schloss Reisensburg (near Ulm, Germany) *A Large-Scale Neutral Comparison Study of Survival Models on Low-Dimensional Data* — [Slides](https://slides.lukasburk.de/2024/07-statcomp/survbench.pdf) - [Biometric Colloquium 2024](https://www.biometrische-gesellschaft.de/termine/biometrische-kolloquien/70th-biometric-colloquium-2024-in-luebeck.html) 70th Biometrical Colloquium of the German Region of the International Biometric Society Lübeck, Germany *A Large-Scale Neutral Comparison Study of Survival Models on Low-Dimensional Data* — [Slides](https://slides.lukasburk.de/2024/02-biocoll/01MAR24_Lukas_Burk.pdf) - [CEN 2023](https://cen2023.github.io/home/) 5th Conference of the Central European Network of the International Biometric Society Basel, Switzerland *High-Dimensional Variable Selection for Competing Risks with Cooperative Penalized Regression* — [Slides](https://slides.lukasburk.de/2023/09-cooper/07SEP23_Lukas_Burk.pdf) ## Workshops - **Data Train: Introduction to Machine Learning** [U Bremen 2021, 2023, 2025](https://www.bremen-research.de/data-train/) Bremen With Prof. Dr. Marvin N. Wright. Recurring two-day introductory ML course in the Data Train program. [Materials](https://bips-hb.github.io/datatrain_workshop_ml/) - **Introduction to R** [RKI CARe Jan 2025](https://github.com/bips-hb/course_introduction_to_r) Online With Luca Bergen. Multi-day R fundamentals course for public health researchers. [Materials](https://bips-hb.github.io/course_introduction_to_r/README.html) - **Introduction to Machine Learning for Survival Analysis with `{mlr3}`** [useR! Jul 2024](https://user2024.r-project.org/) Salzburg With Dr. John Zobolas. Half-day tutorial covering `{mlr3}` and `{mlr3proba}` fundamentals. [Materials](https://survival-org.github.io/user2024-survival-mlr3/)
